firewallRules.name: conceptTagValidation
firewallRules.description: Ensures scenario content directly teaches the concept specified in conceptTag

firewallRules.name: scorePerspectiveCheck
firewallRules.description: Validates score display matches inning perspective (Top=away bats, Bot=home bats)

firewallRules.name: bestAnswerRateAlignment
firewallRules.description: Ensures the option marked as 'best' has the highest rate value

firewallRules.name: forcePlayAccuracy
firewallRules.description: Validates force play mechanics - stepping on base removes subsequent forces

firewallRules.name: ageAppropriatePitchTypes
firewallRules.description: Prevents advanced pitch types (slider, curveball) in diff:1 scenarios

firewallRules.name: positionRoleCompliance
firewallRules.description: Ensures scenarios match the responsibilities of their position

firewallRules.name: rateDistributionLogic
firewallRules.description: Validates rate distribution follows logical probability patterns

firewallRules.name: explanationDistinctness
firewallRules.description: Ensures each explanation teaches a different principle

fixRecommendations.specificFix: Change conceptTag from 'two-strike-approach' to 'slump-recovery' or rewrite scenario to teach two-strike adjustments with 0-2 count
Add runner on first, change to <2 outs, focus on footwork for receiving shortstop's feed and turning to first. Change conceptTag to match or redesign for actual double-play-turn
Rewrite as strategic decision: 'Your star player has played 150 straight games but looks tired before crucial series. Rest or play?' Change conceptTag to 'player-fatigue-mgmt'
Fix rates so curveball (20) < changeup (55) to match explanations. Change conceptTag to 'ground-ball-pitches'. Add count-specific reasoning
Change best answer to option 1 (step on first, throw to second). Clarify that stepping on first removes force at home. Update rates: option 1=85, option 0=45
Fix factual error: walking with bases loaded doesn't 'still' load them. Change conceptTag to 'pitch-around-strategy'. Adjust rates to 15/40/65/20
Change best answer to option 1 (hit the cutoff). Update rates to [50, 85, 10, 5]. Rewrite explanations to teach proper cutoff mechanics
Change age range to 12+ or replace with age-appropriate scenario about blocking/throwing. Fix rate array ordering
Replace with strategic decision (bullpen management, defensive shifts). Change age cap to 18. Remove conflict management content
Fix best answer index to 3, align explanation 3 with option 3, swap score to [0,1], change animation to 'fieldThrow'

frameworkUpgrades.currentGap: No systematic check that scenarios teach their tagged concepts
frameworkUpgrades.implementation: Create concept keyword dictionary and validate that scenario content contains relevant keywords for its conceptTag

frameworkUpgrades.currentGap: Inconsistent handling of home/away perspective in different innings
frameworkUpgrades.proposedEnhancement: Add inning-aware score validation that checks description matches score display
frameworkUpgrades.implementation: Validate that Top innings show away team batting scenarios and Bot innings show home team batting scenarios

frameworkUpgrades.currentGap: Some scenarios assign field play decisions to managers or wrong positions
frameworkUpgrades.implementation: Create position responsibility matrix and validate scenarios match position capabilities

frameworkUpgrades.currentGap: Complex concepts appear in low difficulty scenarios
frameworkUpgrades.proposedEnhancement: Add vocabulary and concept complexity scoring by difficulty level
frameworkUpgrades.implementation: Create age-appropriate term lists and validate against difficulty levels

frameworkUpgrades.currentGap: Explanations often repetitive or don't teach underlying principles
frameworkUpgrades.proposedEnhancement: Add explanation diversity and teaching value scoring
frameworkUpgrades.implementation: Measure explanation uniqueness and presence of teaching principles vs simple assertions

topWeaknesses: Score perspective errors in Top/Bot innings
overallAssessment.recommendation: Implement Tier 1 firewall rules immediately to catch critical errors. Fix all critical priority scenarios before launch. Schedule Tier 2-3 improvements for post-launch updates. Overall quality is good but needs targeted fixes for conceptTag alignment and score perspective issues.
